name: OneMain Financial
description_short: OneMain Financial offers secured and unsecured personal loans from $1,500–$30,000 with fixed rates between 11.99%–35.99% APR and over 100 years in business.
description_long:
OneMain Financial is one of the oldest consumer lending companies in the United States, with over a century of operating history. The company operates physical branch locations across the country, including multiple Florida locations, in addition to offering online and phone-based applications. Its long track record distinguishes it from the wave of fintech lenders that emerged in the 2010s.

OneMain offers both secured and unsecured personal loans ranging from $1,500 to $30,000, with repayment terms between 24 and 60 months. Fixed interest rates range from 11.99% to 35.99% APR. Loan proceeds can be used for a wide variety of purposes including debt consolidation, auto purchase or refinance, medical expenses, home improvement, moving, weddings, emergency costs, and more. Applicants can start the process online, by phone, or in person at a branch.

What sets OneMain apart operationally is its brick-and-mortar branch network with loan specialists available for one-on-one consultations, including after-hours appointments. The company's SpeedFunds feature allows approved borrowers to receive funds in as little as one hour after closing using an eligible bank-issued debit card. There are no prepayment penalties, and all loans carry fixed monthly payments, eliminating payment surprise risk for borrowers on tight budgets.

OneMain Financial serves primarily near-prime and subprime borrowers who may not qualify at banks or credit unions. That accessibility comes at a cost: the upper end of their APR range, 35.99%, is among the highest allowed for installment lenders and can make borrowing expensive for those with weaker credit profiles. Borrowers with strong credit should compare rates elsewhere before accepting an offer. Still, for someone who needs a structured, fixed-payment loan and has limited alternatives, OneMain provides a transparent, regulated option with genuine human support.
address: 501 W MacDade Blvd Ste C, Folsom, PA 19033

company_info.headquarters: 501 W MacDade Blvd Ste C, Folsom, PA 19033

pros: APR range (11.99%–35.99%) disclosed upfront — no hidden rate surprises
No prepayment penalties on any loan
SpeedFunds option: money disbursed in as little as 1 hour after closing
Both secured and unsecured loan options available
Physical branch network with in-person loan specialists
After-hours appointments available to fit borrower schedules
Over 100 years in business — established, regulated lender
cons: Maximum APR of 35.99% is very high — near the legal cap for installment loans
Loan maximum of $30,000 is lower than many online personal loan competitors
Minimum loan of $1,500 means OneMain is not suitable for very small cash needs
Subprime borrowers will likely receive rates at the high end of the range
Branch-heavy model means application experience varies by location and staff
best_for: Fair or poor credit borrowers who need a fixed-payment installment loan
Consumers who prefer face-to-face guidance from a loan specialist
Debt consolidation borrowers with multiple high-interest obligations
People facing a specific expense (medical, auto repair, emergency) with no other financing option
diagnosis: OneMain Financial is best for near-prime or subprime borrowers who need a structured installment loan and value in-person support over the lowest possible rate. The main caveat is cost: borrowers with weaker credit will likely see rates in the 25–36% APR range, making this a last-resort option rather than a first choice for anyone who can qualify at a bank or credit union.
services: SpeedFunds same-day disbursement via debit card
